body_txt: Sometimes adaptations change the way characters feel towards one another. Maybe they're not as close in the source or maybe they're made into enemies in the adaptation. Adaptational Heroism , Promoted to Love Interest , and Adaptational Villainy typically affect how the characters act towards each other, as do being Demoted to Extra and being an Ascended Extra . Often times, being a Pragmatic Adaptation changes things around as well. Sub-Tropes See Historical Relationship Overhaul for when this happens to real people and Reincarnation Relationship Change for when this happens across lifetimes.
